query:
SELECT st.*, u.name
FROM stamp_transactions st
JOIN users u ON st.userId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Rangan%'
ORDER BY st.createdAt;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute SELECT st.*, u.name
FROM stamp_transactions st
JOIN users u ON st.userId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Rangan%'
ORDER BY st.createdAt;
